_meta.instructions: All editable text and image lists for the Anchora Apartments website. Edit this file (or use /admin.html) to change content site-wide. Image filenames must match files in the corresponding /images/ folder. Serbian translations live under translations.sr — keys are the same path as the English value (e.g. 'hero.title').

hero.eyebrow: Anchor · Est. in a 400-year-old stone house
hero.title: Six rustic-luxe retreats in old-town Herceg Novi.
hero.lede: A quiet sanctuary inside a 400-year-old stone house, two minutes from the Adriatic, in the historic heart of Herceg Novi.
hero.imageAlt: Anchor Apartments — historic stone facade in old-town Herceg Novi
hero.signature: Six keys · One stone house · Four centuries

story.title: Four centuries of stone, refined for the way you travel today.
paragraphs: Anchor stone villa occupies a 17th-century stone house (built in 1680, restored 2014/2024) in the strict centre of Herceg Novi's old town — a building shaped by Venetian, Austro-Hungarian and Mediterranean hands, now carefully reimagined into six distinct apartments.

A panoramic terrace looks straight onto the entrance of the Boka Bay, while the spectacular stone yard reads like a small open-air museum. Original walls, hand-hewn timber beams and quiet inner courtyards have been preserved alongside considered modern comforts: hotel-grade linen, deep showers, fast Wi-Fi and air conditioning. Rustic in spirit, luxurious in detail.
story.signature: — It feels like a private home, because it once was.

apartmentsSection.title: Each apartment has its own character.
apartmentsSection.lede: Six layouts, six moods. Whether you are travelling solo, as a couple, or with the family, there is a key in our hands for you.

apartments.name: Suite No. 01
apartments.subtitle: Stone & Beam
apartments.shortDescription: A spacious suite with original stone walls, exposed beams and a generous double bedroom — our most-loved retreat.
longDescription: Our flagship suite occupies a corner of the building where the original stone walls and timber beams have been left fully exposed — the kind of room that lets the house tell its own story.
A king-size bed, a deep soaking experience in the bath, a thoughtful living area with a writing desk, and a compact kitchenette make this the quiet retreat regular guests return to year after year.
Tall narrow windows frame the cobbled lane below; mornings come gently, evenings come golden.

apartments.name: Suite No. 02
apartments.subtitle: Maestral
apartments.shortDescription: A bright corner studio carrying the name of the cool sea breeze — compact, calm, considered.
longDescription: Studio Maestral is named after the gentle north-westerly that drifts through the bay each summer afternoon. Soft linens, a queen-size bed and a quiet sitting nook make it our most popular pick for couples on a short Adriatic break.
A compact kitchenette and a generous bathroom round out the studio — everything you need, nothing in the way.

apartments.name: Suite No. 03
apartments.subtitle: Heritage
apartments.shortDescription: Our largest residence — two bedrooms, a separate living room and the building's most generous bathroom.
longDescription: The Heritage is the largest of our six apartments — two private bedrooms, a separate sitting room, a fully equipped kitchen and a marble bathroom that you'll want to linger in.

It's the home we recommend for families, friends travelling together, or anyone who simply wants room to breathe. Original stone meets soft, hand-finished plasterwork; light pours in from two sides through the day.

apartments.name: Suite No. 04
apartments.subtitle: Levanat
apartments.shortDescription: A warm one-bedroom retreat named after the easterly wind, with a queen bed and a writing nook.
longDescription: Levanat is the still, warm wind that arrives from the east — and it's also the name of our cosiest one-bedroom apartment.
A queen-size bed, a small writing desk under a window, a kitchenette and a generous bathroom make this an excellent base for a longer Adriatic stay.

apartments.name: Suite No. 05
apartments.subtitle: Nevera
apartments.shortDescription: A romantic top-floor apartment named after the sudden Adriatic squall — intimate, atmospheric, with a view from above.
longDescription: Nevera takes its name from the dramatic summer storm that sweeps across the Adriatic — and the apartment carries the same atmosphere: intimate, atmospheric, quietly thrilling. Tucked under the building's original timber beams, it is our top-floor escape.
A queen bed, a softly lit reading corner, a kitchenette and a beautifully tiled bathroom make it the apartment couples often book for anniversaries.

apartments.name: Suite No. 06
apartments.subtitle: Bonaca
apartments.shortDescription: A serene one-bedroom apartment named after the dead-calm Adriatic — for stillness, sleep and slow mornings.
longDescription: Bonaca is the local word for the moment when the sea sits absolutely still — and it's the feeling we want for guests of this apartment.
A queen bed dressed in deep linen, a soft sitting area, a kitchenette and a calm, stone-tiled bathroom make this our most restful room. Sleep here is rumoured to be a little better than usual.

amenities.title: Fast Wi-Fi
amenities.body: Symmetric fibre across every apartment — designed for travellers who still need to work.

amenities.title: Self check-in
amenities.body: Smart locks and a 24-hour digital concierge make late arrivals effortless.

amenities.title: Private parking
amenities.body: A real rarity inside the old town. Reserved spots steps from the entrance, included for our guests.

amenities.title: Hotel-grade linen
amenities.body: 300-thread cotton, daily-changed towels and the kind of pillows you'll want to take home.

amenities.title: Events on the terrace
amenities.body: Private gatherings on the panoramic terrace and the open-air stone yard — tailored to your stay.

building.title: An old stone house, refined.
building.lede: Anchor occupies a single, four-century-old building (built 1680, restored 2014/2024) in the strict centre of Herceg Novi's historic core. A panoramic terrace looks over the entrance of the Boka Bay; the open-air stone yard reads like a small museum. We've kept its bones honest — and made everything else quietly modern.

parking.title: Private parking, in the old town.
parking.lede: Parking inside Herceg Novi's strict centre is famously rare. Our guests don't worry about it — reserved, secure spots are part of every booking.

location.title: In the old town, two minutes from the sea.
location.lede: Anchor sits inside Herceg Novi's historic centre — the kind of address where everything that matters is on foot. The beaches and the bay-front promenade are roughly 200 metres away; the bus station and the medieval walls are minutes from the door.

contact.title: Plan your stay at Anchor.
contact.lede: Tell us your dates and how many guests are travelling — we'll respond personally, usually within a few hours.

footer.tag: Six rustic-luxe apartments inside a 400-year-old stone house, in the strict centre of Herceg Novi old town.

amenitiesSection.lede: Each apartment is set up to meet you ready: linens fresh, climate set, the small things already taken care of.

otherApartments.lede: Have a look at the rest of the house — six unique keys, six different moods.

aptCta.lede: Send us your dates and we'll come back personally — usually within a few hours. Direct bookings always include private parking.

galleryPage.lede: Photographs of the building's exterior, façade, courtyards and the private parking reserved for our guests. Click any photo to enlarge.

gallerySection.buildingLede: Built around 1620 in the strict centre of Herceg Novi old town, our stone house has been carefully restored — keeping its original façade, beams and inner courtyard.
gallerySection.parkingLede: Parking inside the old town is famously hard to find. Our guests don't worry about it — reserved, secure spots are part of every booking.

galleryCta.title: See yourself there?
galleryCta.lede: The six apartments inside this house are waiting. Pick a key.

stayEssentials.title: Quiet luxuries, pre-arranged.
stayEssentials.lede: The kind of details that make a stay feel effortless — taken care of before you arrive, kept invisible during.

duo.title: A stone house, and a parking spot to match.
duo.lede: Two simple promises: a building you'll want to photograph, and a private parking space — a rare gift inside Herceg Novi's old town.

home.title: Anchor Apartments Herceg Novi — Six Rustic-Luxe Suites in the Old Town
home.description: Six unique apartments inside a 400-year-old stone house (built 1680, restored 2014/2024) in the strict centre of Herceg Novi, Montenegro. 200 m to the beaches and promenade, 20 km from Tivat (MNE), 25 km from Dubrovnik (HR). Private parking, hotel-grade linen, terrace with Boka Bay view.
home.keywords: Anchor Apartments Herceg Novi, apartments Herceg Novi old town, luxury apartments Montenegro, stone house apartment Adriatic, Herceg Novi accommodation, near Tivat airport, near Dubrovnik airport

sr.pages.footer.tag: Šest rustično-luksuznih apartmana u kamenoj kući staroj 400 godina, u strogom centru starog grada Herceg Novog.
sr.pages.amenitiesSection.title: Sve spremno.
sr.pages.amenitiesSection.lede: Svaki apartman je pripremljen da te dočeka: posteljina svježa, klima podešena, sitnice riješene.
sr.pages.photoGallery.title: Pogled iznutra.
sr.pages.photoGallery.lede: Klikni na bilo koju sliku da vidiš galeriju u uvećanom prikazu. Sve fotografije su iz stvarnog apartmana.
sr.pages.otherApartments.title: Ostalih pet.
sr.pages.otherApartments.lede: Pogledaj i ostatak kuće — šest različitih ključeva, šest različitih raspoloženja.
sr.pages.aptCta.lede: Pošalji nam datume i odgovorićemo lično — obično u roku od nekoliko sati. Direktne rezervacije uvijek uključuju privatni parking.
sr.pages.galleryPage.title: Četiri vijeka kamena, i parking u centru.
sr.pages.galleryPage.lede: Fotografije fasade, vanjskog izgleda, kamenih dvorišta i privatnog parkinga rezervisanog za naše goste. Klikni na sliku da je uvećaš.
sr.pages.gallerySection.buildingLede: Sagrađena oko 1620. godine u strogom centru starog grada Herceg Novog, naša kamena kuća je pažljivo restaurirana — sačuvane su originalna fasada, drvene grede i unutrašnje dvorište.
sr.pages.gallerySection.parkingLede: Parking u starom gradu je čuveno teško naći. Naši gosti o tome ne brinu — rezervisana, sigurna mjesta su dio svake rezervacije.
sr.pages.galleryCta.title: Vidiš li sebe ovdje?
sr.pages.galleryCta.lede: Šest apartmana u ovoj kući te čeka. Izaberi ključ.
sr.pages.stayEssentials.title: Tihi luksuz, unaprijed pripremljen.
sr.pages.stayEssentials.lede: Detalji zbog kojih se boravak čini bezbrižnim — riješeni prije tvog dolaska, nevidljivi tokom njega.
sr.pages.duo.title: Kamena kuća, i parking za nju.
sr.pages.duo.lede: Dva jednostavna obećanja: zgrada koju ćeš poželjeti fotografisati, i privatno parking mjesto — rijedak poklon u starom gradu Herceg Novog.

sr.amenities[3].body: Pamuk od 300 niti, peškiri koji se mijenjaju svakodnevno i jastuci koje ćeš poželjeti da poneseš kući.
sr.hero.eyebrow: Anchor · U kamenoj kući staroj 400 godina
sr.hero.title: Vaše luksuzno rustično utočište u srcustarog grada Herceg Novog.
sr.hero.lede: Tihi kutak u rekonstruisanoj kamenoj vili staroj 400 godina,udaljenoj dva minuta od mora, u istorijskom srcu starog grada.
sr.hero.imageAlt: Anchor Apartmani — četiri vijeka kamena oplemenjena za današnje potrebe  u starom gradu Herceg Novog.
sr.hero.primaryCta.label: Pogledaj Apartmane
sr.hero.secondaryCta.label: Pošalji Upit
sr.hero.signature: Jedna kamena vila -  Četiri vijeka - Šest ključeva
sr.story.title: Četiri vijeka kamena, oplemenjena za način na koji putuješ danas.
story.paragraphs: Anchor kamena vila smještena je u kamenoj kući iz 17. vijeka (sagrađenoj 1680, restauriranoj 2014/2024) u strogom centru starog grada Herceg Novog — građevini koju su oblikovale venecijanske, austrougarske i mediteranske ruke, pažljivo preoblikovanoj u šest različitih apartmana.

Panoramska terasa gleda direktno na ulaz u Bokokotorski zaliv, dok prostrano kameno dvorište djeluje poput malog muzeja na otvorenom. Originalni zidovi, ručno tesane drvene grede i tihi unutrašnji kutci sačuvani su uz pažljivo odabrane moderne detalje: brzi Wi-Fi , klimatizacija,kvalitetna oprema. Rustično u duhu, luksuzno u detaljima. Na otvoreno,uz izloženih preko 40 muzejskih sidara iz epoha po kome je i vila dobila ime - Anchor (Sidro)
sr.story.signature: — Doživljaj je kao u privatnom domu, jer je nekad to i bio.
sr.story.stats[0].label: Godina istorije
sr.story.stats[1].label: Pažljivo uređenih apartmana
sr.story.stats[2].label: Do plaža i šetališta
sr.apartmentsSection.title: Svaki apartman ima svoj karakter.
sr.apartmentsSection.lede: Šest različitih prostora, šest različitih raspoloženja. Bilo da putuješ sam, u dvoje ili sa porodicom, za tebe imamo pravi ključ.
sr.apartments[0].name: Apartman br. 01
sr.apartments[0].subtitle: Kamen i Greda
sr.apartments[0].shortDescription: Prostran apartman sa originalnim kamenim zidovima, vidljivim drvenim gredama i prostranom spavaćom sobom — naše najomiljenije utočište.
apartments[0].longDescription: Naš najupečatljiviji apartman zauzima ugao zgrade u kojem su originalni kameni zidovi i drvene grede ostavljeni potpuno otkriveni — soba u kojoj kuća sama priča svoju priču.
King-size krevet, kupatilo sa dubokom kadom, promišljen dnevni boravak sa radnim stolom i kompaktnom čajnom kuhinjom čine ovo tiho utočište u koje se redovni gosti vraćaju iz godine u godinu.
Visoki uski prozori uokviruju popločanu uličicu — jutra dolaze nježno, večeri zlatno.
sr.apartments[1].name: Apartman br. 02
sr.apartments[1].subtitle: Maestral
sr.apartments[1].shortDescription: Svijetli ugaoni studio koji nosi ime svježeg morskog povjetarca — kompaktan, miran, promišljen.
apartments[1].longDescription: Studio Maestral nazvan je po blagom sjeverozapadnom vjetru koji se kroz zaliv povlači svakog ljetnog popodneva. Mekani lan, queen-size krevet i tihi kutak za sjedenje čine ga našim najpopularnijim izborom za parove na kratkom jadranskom odmoru.
Kompaktna čajna kuhinja i prostrano kupatilo zaokružuju studio — sve što ti treba, ništa što smeta.
sr.apartments[2].name: Apartman br. 03
sr.apartments[2].subtitle: Nasljeđe
sr.apartments[2].shortDescription: Naša najprostranija rezidencija — dvije spavaće sobe, odvojeni dnevni boravak i najveće kupatilo u zgradi.
apartments[2].longDescription: Heritage je najveći od naših šest apartmana — dvije odvojene spavaće sobe, izdvojen dnevni boravak, potpuno opremljena kuhinja i mermerno kupatilo u kojem ćeš poželjeti da se zadržiš.

Ovo je dom koji preporučujemo porodicama, prijateljima koji putuju zajedno, ili svakom ko jednostavno želi prostor da diše. Originalni kamen susreće se sa mekim, ručno obrađenim malterskim površinama; svjetlost ulazi sa dvije strane tokom cijelog dana.
sr.apartments[3].name: Apartman br. 04
sr.apartments[3].subtitle: Levanat
sr.apartments[3].shortDescription: Topao jednosoban apartman nazvan po istočnom vjetru, sa queen krevetom i kutkom za rad.
apartments[3].longDescription: Levanat je tih, topao vjetar koji dolazi sa istoka — i ime je našeg najprijatnijeg jednosobnog apartmana.
Queen-size krevet, mali radni sto pod prozorom, čajna kuhinja i prostrano kupatilo čine ga odličnom bazom za duži jadranski boravak.
sr.apartments[4].name: Apartman br. 05
sr.apartments[4].subtitle: Nevera
sr.apartments[4].shortDescription: Romantičan apartman na najvišem spratu nazvan po naglom jadranskom nevremenu — intiman, atmosferski, sa pogledom odozgo.
apartments[4].longDescription: Nevera nosi ime dramatične ljetnje oluje koja prelazi preko Jadrana — i apartman ima istu atmosferu: intimnu, slojevitu, tiho uzbudljivu. Smješten pod originalnim drvenim gredama zgrade, ovo je naše utočište na najvišem spratu.
Queen krevet, mekano osvijetljen kutak za čitanje, čajna kuhinja i prelijepo opločano kupatilo čine ga apartmanom koji parovi često rezervišu za godišnjice.
sr.apartments[5].name: Apartman br. 06
sr.apartments[5].subtitle: Bonaca
sr.apartments[5].shortDescription: Mirni jednosoban apartman nazvan po potpuno mirnom Jadranu — za tišinu, san i lagana jutra.
apartments[5].longDescription: Bonaca je lokalni izraz za trenutak kada more potpuno miruje — i to je osjećaj koji želimo za goste ovog apartmana.
Queen krevet odjeven u duboki lan, mekan kutak za sjedenje, čajna kuhinja i miran kameni kutak za kupatilo čine ga našom najopuštajućom sobom. Govori se da je san ovdje malo bolji nego inače.

amenities.title: Brzi Wi-Fi
amenities.body: Simetrični optički internet u svakom apartmanu — za putnike koji i dalje moraju da rade.

amenities.title: Samostalan check-in
amenities.body: Pametne brave i 24-časovni digitalni concierge čine kasne dolaske jednostavnim.

amenities.title: Privatni parking
amenities.body: Prava rijetkost u starom gradu. Rezervisana mjesta na nekoliko koraka od ulaza, uključeno za naše goste.

amenities.title: Hotelska posteljina
amenities.body: Hotelska posteljina visokog kvaliteta uz vaš poseban zahtjev, mjenja se u dogovoru s vama

amenities.title: Događaji na terasi
amenities.body: Privatna okupljanja na panoramskoj terasi i u otvorenom kamenom dvorištu — prilagođeno tvom boravku.

sr.building.title: Stara kamena kuća, oplemenjena.
sr.building.lede: Anchor zauzima jednu zgradu staru četiri vijeka (sagrađenu 1680, restauriranu 2014/2024) u strogom centru istorijskog jezgra Herceg Novog. Panoramska terasa gleda na ulaz u Bokokotorski zaliv; otvoreno kameno dvorište djeluje kao mali muzej. Sačuvali smo kosti zgrade — i sve ostalo učinili tiho modernim.
sr.parking.title: Privatni parking, u starom gradu.
sr.parking.lede: Parking u strogom centru Herceg Novog je čuveno rijedak. Naši gosti o tome ne brinu — rezervisana, sigurna mjesta uključena su u svaku rezervaciju.
sr.location.title: U starom gradu, dva minuta od mora.
sr.location.lede: Anchor se nalazi u istorijskom centru Herceg Novog — adresa na kojoj je sve važno na nekoliko koraka. Plaže i obalno šetalište udaljeni su oko 200 metara; autobuska stanica i srednjovjekovne zidine na nekoliko minuta od ulaza.
sr.contact.title: Planiraj svoj boravak u Anchor-u.
sr.contact.lede: Napiši nam datume i broj gostiju — odgovorićemo lično, obično u roku od nekoliko sati.

contact.details.label: Adresa
contact.details.value: Marka Vojnovića 33, 85340 Herceg Novi, Crna Gora

sr.seo.home.title: Anchor Apartmani Herceg Novi — Šest rustično-luksuznih apartmana u starom gradu
sr.seo.home.description: Šest jedinstvenih apartmana u kamenoj kući staroj 400 godina (sagrađenoj 1680, restauriranoj 2014/2024) u strogom centru Herceg Novog, Crna Gora. 200 m do plaža i šetališta, 20 km od Tivta (CG), 25 km od Dubrovnika (HR). Privatni parking, hotelska posteljina, terasa sa pogledom na Boku.
